item.title: This Boat Shouldn’t Run But Does
item.description: A look at a ridiculous garage setup as it gets put to the test and proves itself. Focused on the repair process and hands-on work. What happens when the setup finally runs?

media:content.media:title: This Boat Shouldn’t Run But Does
media:content.media:description: A look at a ridiculous garage setup as it gets put to the test and proves itself. Focused on the repair process and hands-on work. What happens when the setup finally runs?

item.title: One Wrong Move Wrecks This Hydrostat
item.description: The cheap fix works if you avoid the expensive mistake first. A practical garage repair lesson on what to check before making the fix. What would you inspect first?

media:content.media:title: One Wrong Move Wrecks This Hydrostat
media:content.media:description: The cheap fix works if you avoid the expensive mistake first. A practical garage repair lesson on what to check before making the fix. What would you inspect first?

item.title: Can This Neglected Tri-Axle Be Saved?
item.description: Years of neglect have left this tri-axle truck in rough condition, but the question remains: is it beyond repair or ready for a second chance? A closer inspection reveals what it will take to bring this heavy-duty workhorse back to life.

media:content.media:title: Can This Neglected Tri-Axle Be Saved?
media:content.media:description: Years of neglect have left this tri-axle truck in rough condition, but the question remains: is it beyond repair or ready for a second chance? A closer inspection reveals what it will take to bring this heavy-duty workhorse back to life.

item.title: One Last Chance
item.description: An old yard machine gets one shot at proving it still has some fight left. After years of hard work and wear, it's time to see whether this veteran can rise to the challenge one more time

media:content.media:title: One Last Chance
media:content.media:description: An old yard machine gets one shot at proving it still has some fight left. After years of hard work and wear, it's time to see whether this veteran can rise to the challenge one more time

item.title: $300 Diesel Rescue
item.description: A cheap rescue turns into a shop-built comeback, with the focus on hands-on mechanical work and the steps behind the repair. What would you check first on a $300 find?

media:content.media:title: $300 Diesel Rescue
media:content.media:description: A cheap rescue turns into a shop-built comeback, with the focus on hands-on mechanical work and the steps behind the repair. What would you check first on a $300 find?

item.title: Does a Drill Push a Boat?
item.description: We had to try it just to see how ridiculous the answer would be. A simple test to see whether a drill can actually push a boat. What do you think the result will be?

media:content.media:title: Does a Drill Push a Boat?
media:content.media:description: We had to try it just to see how ridiculous the answer would be. A simple test to see whether a drill can actually push a boat. What do you think the result will be?

item.title: Will It Run After 7 Years?
item.description: One key turn shows whether this old iron gets a second chance after sitting forgotten for seven years. A simple start test, but an important one for any diesel project. Will it fire up?

media:content.media:title: Will It Run After 7 Years?
media:content.media:description: One key turn shows whether this old iron gets a second chance after sitting forgotten for seven years. A simple start test, but an important one for any diesel project. Will it fire up?

item.title: The Forgotten ’87 Kenworth Roars Again
item.description: After years of sitting silent and forgotten, this 1987 Kenworth gets a second chance at life. With determination, mechanical know-how, and a little luck, the classic truck is brought back to life—proving that some legends never truly fade.

media:content.media:title: The Forgotten ’87 Kenworth Roars Again
media:content.media:description: After years of sitting silent and forgotten, this 1987 Kenworth gets a second chance at life. With determination, mechanical know-how, and a little luck, the classic truck is brought back to life—proving that some legends never truly fade.

item.title: King Ranch inside, CAT 3126 underhood
item.description: A Ford F-350 combines the comfort of a King Ranch interior with the rugged performance of a CAT 3126 engine swap. It's a unique blend of refinement and serious diesel power.

media:content.media:title: King Ranch inside, CAT 3126 underhood
media:content.media:description: A Ford F-350 combines the comfort of a King Ranch interior with the rugged performance of a CAT 3126 engine swap. It's a unique blend of refinement and serious diesel power.
